failures.description: No failure is identifiable in the provided trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user goal: find available Mechanical Keyboards with backlight=RGB whose price is strictly greater than $233.90. It called ProductCatalogSearch with the correct filters, received five matching available RGB mechanical keyboards, then correctly filtered prices greater than 233.90. Items priced 272.33 and 237.48 qualify; 233.90 is equal, not greater, so it is correctly excluded. No tool invocation, reasoning, intent, or adherence failure is evident.
